figures.caption: Fig. 1: Overview of C-MTAD-GAT: the architecture jointly models temporal dynamics and cross-feature dependencies, while conditioning on contextual input; anomalies are identified by measuring how much each feature deviates from learned reconstructions and forecasts.

Table 2: TELCO — Pointwise scores. Best is bold; second-best is shaded. Timestamp Counts. Micro: Ground Truth (GT)= 3001, Random=3001, DC-VAE=1482, MTAD-GAT=476, β-MTAD-GAT=1209, C-MTAD-GAT=1389. Union: GT= 1186, Random=2850, DC-VAE=1268, MTAD-GAT=445, β-MTAD-GAT=991, C-MTAD-GAT=1163.
